recap: Kylian Mbappé converted a 70th-minute penalty to secure France's 1-0 victory over Paraguay in stifling 38C heat, notching his 19th World Cup goal to close within one of Lionel Messi's all-time record. Paraguay's goalkeeper Orlando Gill made crucial saves to keep the deficit at one, denying Mbappé twice in stoppage time after the French star also squandered a breakaway opportunity. The win sent France into the quarterfinals for the fourth consecutive tournament, where they will face Morocco in Foxborough.
